meaning: n.印度苏拉特产的劣质棉布,苏拉特(印度西部港市)
examples: A chimney is reflected in a puddle polluted with chemicals at an industrial area of the western Indian city of Surat.
They are Dalian in China, Naga in the Philippines, Surat in India and Bandung in Indonesia.
The provinces of Chumphon, Nakhon Si Thammarat, Surat Thani, Trang, Krabi and Phatthalung have been the hardest hit.
In the case of Surat, the trigger was, of all things, an outbreak of the plague in 1994.
